name: api_flux2_pro_4img
description: Flux.2 [pro] API — four-reference composition. Batches four LoadImage inputs through BatchImagesNode and feeds them, along with a text prompt, to the Flux2ProImageNode. Best suited for composite portraits, character group shots, and reference-driven scenes. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the composite scene to generate from the four reference images.

image1.description: First reference image (slot 0 in the batch).

image2.description: Second reference image (slot 1 in the batch).

image3.description: Third reference image (slot 2 in the batch).

image4.description: Fourth reference image (slot 3 in the batch).
